jd_text:
Job Description

We are currently seeking a Steel Structure QC Inspector, reporting directly to the Head of the Department to join our team based in UAE, Abu Dhabi.

About us:

Technip Energies is a global technology and engineering powerhouse. With leadership positions in LNG, hydrogen, ethylene, sustainable chemistry, and CO2 management, we are contributing to the development of critical markets such as energy, energy derivatives, decarbonization, and circularity. Our complementary business segments, Technology, Products and Services (TPS) and Project Delivery, turn innovation into scalable and industrial reality.

Through collaboration and excellence in execution, our 17,000+ employees across 34 countries are fully committed to bridging prosperity with sustainability for a world designed to last.

About the mission we offer you:

Location: Ruwais, UAE

Experience: 6 months – 1 year

Nationality: UAE Nationals only

Employment Type: Full-time – Site-based

Key Responsibilities

Assist in conducting quality inspections for steel structure fabrication and installation activities.Verify that steel works comply with approved drawings, project specifications, and international standards.Monitor welding activities, fit-up, alignment, bolting, and material traceability on site.Coordinate with contractors, subcontractors, and QC teams to resolve quality-related issues.Support inspection activities such as dimensional checks, visual welding inspections, and bolt torque verification.Prepare and maintain daily QC reports, inspection records, and non-conformance documentation.Report deviations, defects, or non-compliance to the QC Engineer/Supervisor promptly.Ensure adherence to HSE and quality procedures while promoting safe working practices.


Qualifications & Requirements

UAE National (Emiratisation role).6 months to 1 year of experience in steel structure QC, welding inspection, or related field.Diploma or bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, or a related discipline (preferred).Basic understanding of steel structure drawings, welding processes, and inspection techniques.Knowledge of QA/QC procedures and documentation practices.Strong communication and teamwork skills.Willingness to work in Ruwais on a site-based schedule.


Skills & Competencies

Basic knowledge of steel structure fabrication and erection.Attention to detail and strong observation skills.Ability to work in a fast-paced, construction-driven environment.Commitment to safety, quality, and compliance standards.


Starting Date: ASAP

Your career with us 

Working at Technip Energies is an inspiring journey, filled with groundbreaking projects and dynamic collaborations. Surrounded by diverse and talented individuals, you will feel welcomed, respected, and engaged. Enjoy a safe, caring environment where you can spark new ideas, reimagine the future, and lead change. As your career grows, you will benefit from learning opportunities at T. EN University, such as The Future Ready Program, Graduate Program, and from the support of your manager through check-in moments like the Mid-Year Development Review, fostering continuous growth and development.

What’s Next?

Once receiving your system application, our recruiting team will screen and match your skills, experience, and potential team fit against the role requirements. We ask for your patience as the team completes the volume of applications with a reasonable timeframe. Check your application progress periodically via personal account from created candidate profile during your application.

We invite you to get to know more about our company by visiting www.ten.com and follow us on LinkedIn , Instagram , Facebook , X and YouTube for company updates.
